executive_summary.summary: This report provides a general assessment of a business's digital presence based on common industry best practices. It identifies typical strengths, challenges, and opportunities that influence online visibility, customer engagement, and long-term business growth.
executive_summary.top_strength: The business has an existing foundation that can be improved through structured digital optimization.
executive_summary.biggest_challenge: Limited digital optimization across website, SEO, branding, marketing, and customer engagement.

target_audience: Potential customers based on the business niche

website.status: Existing website or digital presence with opportunities for performance, usability, and conversion improvements.

marketing.status: Marketing activities exist but require better consistency and strategic execution.

social_media.status: Social media presence can benefit from consistent posting, stronger branding, and improved engagement.

seo.status: Basic SEO improvements are recommended to increase online visibility and search rankings.

strengths: Growth opportunities across multiple digital channels

competitor_analysis.key_advantage: Opportunity to differentiate through better customer experience, branding, SEO, and automation.
competitor_analysis.largest_gap: Digital marketing consistency and online visibility.

priority_actions.title: Optimize Website Performance and User Experience
Implement AI Customer Support and Automation

30_days: Set up or optimize Google Business Profile
Create a social media content plan

recommended_plan.reason: The Basic Plan provides the essential digital services most businesses need to establish a professional online presence and improve customer engagement while remaining cost-effective.
